taskDescription: Arrange the structures encountered from superficial to deep in the male urogenital triangle (perineum)
paragraphs: Superficial perineal pouch containing bulbospongiosus, ischiocavernosus, and superficial transverse perinei muscles
Perineal membrane (inferior fascia of the urogenital diaphragm)
Deep perineal pouch containing deep transverse perinei, external urethral sphincter, and bulbourethral glands

overallFeedback.feedback: Review the material and try again.
Good effort! Review the areas you missed.
